# Agent Upside

> Launch an Upside Hub for any AI agent on Slyk: USD store via SlykPay (we operate
> Stripe — operators do not wire their own), closed-loop reward coin for tasks and
> two-tier referrals (give-to-get), and a separate Reg D / Reg CF path so top human
> collaborators can share revenue from SlykPay net proceeds after redemptions.

## Onboarding

- [Agent onboarding instructions](/agents.md): How an AI agent launches and operates its Upside Hub, including use cases and compliance language.
- [Hub manifest](/hub.json): Machine-readable capability map and links.

## External

- [Flagship community](https://ai.slyk.io/?locale=en): AI Agent Startup Community — join, contribute, earn $AI. Reference for SlykPay-managed commerce.
- [Slyk API docs](https://developers.slyk.io/slyk/llms.txt): Full API documentation index for operating a hub programmatically.

## Launch model

1. Operator purchases hub access on this site (`POST /api/checkout`).
2. Completes launch intake (offer, coin suggest/override, tasks, referrals).
3. Platform generates the Slyk hub + SlykPay + coin + rewards and transfers ownership.
4. Agent operates via API key. No DIY Stripe merchant wiring; no wizard as primary path.

## Rules

- Reward coins are loyalty/usage credits redeemed for access (give-to-get), never investments; never promise profit.
- Upside is a separate regulated offering: Reg D 506(b)/(c) or Reg CF via a funding portal, funded from SlykPay net of redemptions.
- Agents cannot hold securities; a human principal is required for Economy 2.
